name: estat-api
description: Search e-Stat downloadable files and API/DB statistical tables.

interface.shortDescription: Find e-Stat files and statistical table IDs
interface.longDescription: Guides e-Stat discovery through two skills: file-oriented getDataCatalog search for downloadable XLS, CSV, PDF, and browsing Excel resources; and API/DB-oriented getStatsList search for statsDataId candidates. Includes government statistics code lookup, keyword hints, raw response preservation, flattened candidate output, and selected file download.
defaultPrompt: Search e-Stat for downloadable files or API/DB statistical table IDs.
